title: Fix Excel export filename to use proper project name

requirements.text: Update the ExportButton component to generate the CSV filename using 'Pilot_Flight_Logbook' as the base name instead of the current filename, formatted as 'Pilot_Flight_Logbook_YYYY-MM-DD.csv' where YYYY-MM-DD is the current date

quotes: Excel sheet in  name not the proper work name

acceptanceCriteria: Downloaded CSV file is named 'Pilot_Flight_Logbook_YYYY-MM-DD.csv' with the current date
Filename uses underscores instead of spaces
Filename reflects the proper project name 'Pilot Flight Logbook'
Export functionality continues to work without errors

constraints: Do not modify the CSV content format or data structure
Maintain existing export functionality and user experience
nonGoals: Changing the CSV data columns or content
